Hi, I’m Chamindu.

Full-Stack Software Engineer building web, mobile, AI & IoT solutions.

Creative and passionate technology professional with hands-on experience in full-stack web, mobile, AI, and IoT application development. Skilled in React, Next.js, Node.js, Spring Boot, React Native, Flutter, and modern databases, with practical industry experience building scalable and user-focused solutions. Driven by innovation, continuous learning, and solving real-world challenges through technology.

📍 Homagama, Sri Lanka
01 · ABOUT

The person behind the code

Full-stack engineer with a habit of pairing technical builds with community leadership.

I design and build end-to-end digital products that combine thoughtful user experiences with reliable engineering. My work spans responsive web platforms, cross-platform mobile applications, intelligent systems, and connected IoT solutions.

My practical experience includes building with React, Next.js, Node.js, Spring Boot, MongoDB, MySQL, React Native, and Flutter. During my software engineering internship, I contributed to production-focused applications, RESTful APIs, authentication flows, and AI- and IoT-enabled solutions.

Beyond engineering, community leadership has strengthened how I collaborate, take ownership, and turn ambitious ideas into measurable outcomes. I bring that same curiosity, discipline, and sense of purpose to every product I create.

  • DEGREEBSc (Hons) Information Technology — SLIIT, 2022–2026
  • ROLESoftware Engineering Intern @ Gamage Recruiters
  • LOCATIONHomagama, Sri Lanka
  • FOCUSFull-Stack, Mobile, Cloud & AI Solutions
